metadata.description: Statistical analysis tools for Claude — backed by a persistent R worker.

plugins.name: mcp-stats-oracle
plugins.description: 8 statistical analysis tools Claude can call directly: catch22 time-series features, Bayesian changepoint detection, MRCD robust-regression outlier flagging, Money Flow Index, TSrepr cyclical compression, Bayesian nowcasting, ASCII ggplot rendering via plotcli, and a describe_data helper. Includes auto-lifecycle hooks that manage the R Plumber worker for you.
